file_insights.purpose: Song generation engine orchestrating LLMProvider + Preset to produce SunoOutput
key_components: async generate_song() - main entry point with retry logic
GenerationError - custom exception for generation failures

patterns_discovered.description: On malformed response, retry with tightened/stricter prompt rather than immediate failure
patterns_discovered.implementation: Catches ValidationError/JSONDecodeError/KeyError/TypeError, calls _stricter_prompt(), retries up to MAX_RETRIES
patterns_discovered.benefit: Improves resilience against LLM output formatting issues without external intervention

patterns_discovered.description: Use Pydantic SunoOutput schema for automatic response structure validation
patterns_discovered.implementation: provider.generate() accepts response_schema parameter; _parse_response uses SunoOutput.model_validate()
patterns_discovered.benefit: Type-safe, contracts-based communication with LLM provider

patterns_discovered.description: Provider methods are async, enabling concurrent generation and network I/O handling
patterns_discovered.implementation: await provider.generate() with system_prompt, user_prompt, response_schema
patterns_discovered.benefit: Non-blocking, composable with other async operations

patterns_discovered.description: Prior evaluation feedback incorporated into prompt to guide iterative improvement
patterns_discovered.implementation: Optional prior_feedback parameter passed to build_generation_prompt()
patterns_discovered.benefit: Enables refinement loop: generate → evaluate → regenerate with feedback

gotchas_discovered.description: LLM may produce invalid JSON, incomplete structures, or mixed text/JSON output
gotchas_discovered.handling: Catches ValidationError, json.JSONDecodeError, KeyError, TypeError; retries with stricter prompt
gotchas_discovered.potential_issues: Only 2 retries may insufficient for severely broken LLMs; last_error logging could hide intermediate failures

gotchas_discovered.description: _stricter_prompt only appends suffix; doesn't fundamentally restructure prompt or use chain-of-thought
gotchas_discovered.handling: Current implementation adds CRITICAL directive; may need CoT, examples, or format enforcement
gotchas_discovered.potential_issues: If LLM consistently ignores structure, retries will fail identically

gotchas_discovered.description: raw_response overwritten on each attempt; only final response logged on failure
gotchas_discovered.handling: Last raw_response is logged; earlier attempts discarded
gotchas_discovered.potential_issues: Debugging multiple failed attempts difficult; intermediate outputs lost

gotchas_discovered.description: MAX_RETRIES = 2 hardcoded; no configurability per preset or provider
gotchas_discovered.potential_issues: Different providers/presets may benefit from different retry counts

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully created generator.py module with robust async song generation function
key_achievements: Async/await pattern for non-blocking LLM integration
Retry logic with adaptive prompt tightening (Edge Case 3 mitigation)
Clean separation: generation logic, response parsing, prompt adjustment
Comprehensive exception handling (ValidationError, JSON, type errors)
Feedback-aware prompt building for iterative refinement
Logging at WARNING/ERROR levels for observability
design_decisions: 2 maximum retries chosen (1 initial + 1 retry with stricter prompt)
Pydantic model_validate() for type-safe response validation
Prompt suffix appending for retry tightening (vs. full rewrite)
GenerationError custom exception for clear failure signaling

recommendations.rationale: Different providers or deployment environments may benefit from adaptive retry counts
recommendations.implementation: Pass max_retries parameter to generate_song() or load from preset/config

recommendations.recommendation: Collect all intermediate responses/errors, not just last
recommendations.rationale: Debugging multi-attempt failures requires visibility into each attempt's failure mode
recommendations.implementation: Maintain list of (attempt, raw_response, error) tuples; log aggregated summary on final failure

recommendations.recommendation: Consider exponential backoff or adaptive retry strategies
recommendations.rationale: Immediate retry may hit same rate limits; progressive backoff improves success rates
recommendations.implementation: Add optional delay between retries; vary based on error type (rate limit vs. validation)

recommendations.rationale: Simple suffix may be insufficient for complex LLM behavior; examples improve structure compliance
recommendations.implementation: Include valid JSON example in strict_suffix; consider few-shot demonstration

recommendations.recommendation: Add unit tests for edge cases
recommendations.rationale: Retry logic, prompt tightening, and various exception types need coverage
recommendations.implementation: Mock LLMProvider to return malformed responses; verify retry behavior and error messages

recommendations.recommendation: Consider caching or batching generation requests
recommendations.rationale: Identical presets/feedback combinations may be regenerated unnecessarily
recommendations.implementation: Memoize generate_song() results based on (preset, prior_feedback) hash
